visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top with shoulder cut-outs and silver jewelry, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. Behind her are massive vertical stacks of 'Salted Egg Yolk Cookies' in yellow boxes. She excitedly holds a cream-colored floral box of 'Aunt Stella' tea cookies. High-density variety text overlays appear around her. (2) A crisp, high-definition close-up shot focuses on a white warehouse price label. It clearly displays the brand name 'AUNT STELLA' and the product 'TW-TEA COOKIES SET' along with a prominent price of '$369' in large black digits against a white background under bright overhead lights. (3) The female protagonist returns to the screen, standing amidst the towering product shelves at Costco. She continues her enthusiastic delivery, using wide arm movements and expressive facial expressions to convey her excitement about the find. The lighting is consistent and bright across the busy retail floor environment. (4) The scene shifts to a cozy indoor living room setting. Two women are seated at a wooden table. One is the woman from before, while the other wears a black and white zebra-patterned bucket hat. They hold a white plate with three different flavored cookies and show the open box containing individual foil packets. (5) Series of close-up shots show the women breaking the cookies in half to reveal their interior texture. They are eating and reacting with exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment and surprise. The background features warm home lighting, decorative pillows, and household items on shelves.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Variety]: 找到了 找到了 找到了. [Subtitle]: 詩特莉 台茶精選餅乾. (3) [Subtitle]: 這個是我找了 真的找很久 你知道嗎 桃園終於上了. (4) [Variety]: 好市多隱藏版. [Subtitle]: 已經快變成了 好市多隱藏版了 詩特莉 百貨公司 小時候經過 SOGO 百貨公司才有得. (5) [Variety]: 詩特莉阿姨餅乾. [Subtitle]: 對呀 詩特莉阿姨餅乾 它是稱重的那種貴餅乾. (6) [Subtitle]: 369元 我跟你講 但是我詩特莉送人家禮盒都是500起跳 這個真的很划算 我們回去看看有沒有好吃. (7) [Variety]: 第五次了. [Subtitle]: 最重要是它終於進了 我真的來這裡第五次了 終於找到它. (8) [Variety]: 詩特莉 台茶精選餅乾. [Subtitle]: 詩特莉的台茶精選餅乾. (9) [Subtitle]: 369元然後裡面有15包 每一包是兩片 裡面總共30片. (10) [Subtitle]: 有三種口味 分別是紅玉紅茶 鐵觀音跟碧螺春玄米茶餅乾. (11) [Variety]: 從淺到深去吃的話. [Subtitle]: 然後我們個人覺得 從淺到深去吃的話 是先吃紅茶 再吃鐵觀音 再吃碧螺春玄米茶. (12) [Subtitle]: 它的紅茶呢 可以看到滿滿的 都是這個紅茶茶葉 吃起來呢 就是你一嚼下去呢 先是餅乾的清甜 然後接下來你越嚼 越有那個茶葉的芬芳清香出來. (13) [Variety]: 開了一間茶湯會. [Subtitle]: 鐵觀音呢 這個就是你把它放到嘴巴裡嚼 你的嘴巴裡就會開了一間茶湯會 沒錯. (14) [Subtitle]: 最後是這個碧螺春玄米 它非常特別 它裡面是包了真的一整顆的玄米 然後吃起來 它其實吃起來有點像那種抹茶的苦澀 可是那個苦澀一咬下去之後呢 那個玄米的米香就會噴發出來 整個融合交纏在一起 非常美味 這三個口味都是缺一不可 超級好吃. (15) [Subtitle]: 而且它的餅乾甜度都很低 真的很適合愛喝茶的你.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female reviewers in the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The first woman has long dark hair and wears a black cut-out top. The second woman wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a brown top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First half is a Costco warehouse with industrial shelving and bulk goods. Second half is a domestic living room with a couch, table, and toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-tempo, energetic pop-electronic BGM starts with a strong synthetic beat. A female voice (Vocal 1) speaks with high arousal and a bright, clear tone, expressing extreme excitement about finding a cookie set. Her speech rate is fast and enthusiastic. A sharp 'whoosh' SFX accompanies the initial visual titles. (2) Vocal 1 continues her enthusiastic narration describing her search for the product. The BGM remains consistent in the background with a steady 124 BPM driving pulse. Sharp 'ding' and 'impact' SFX coincide with variety text appearing on screen to emphasize keywords like 'Found it'. (3) The acoustic texture shifts as the scene moves to a domestic interior. The voice exhibits a slightly more natural reverb consistent with a home environment. A second female voice (Vocal 2) joins in, contributing to the review. The BGM remains a constant, high-energy foundation throughout this segment. (4) Vocal 1 provides a detailed listing of cookie flavors. Her articulation is enunciated and clear. The BGM's synthesizer textures remain bright and prominent. Additional 'pop' and 'sparkle' post-production sound effects are used to punctuate the transition between different flavors described in the narration. (5) Audible crunching sounds (incidental food bite noise) are heard as the reviewers taste the cookies. Vocal 1's tone shifts to a satisfied and melodic delivery during the sensory description of the taste. The audio track maintains high density until a final hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a specific tea cookie gift set by Aunt Stella found at Costco. It leverages the scarcity of the product ('hidden version') and its high perceived value ('usually $500+') to encourage viewers to purchase it. The creators provide a detailed sensory review of three flavors to validate the purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct showcase of product packaging, price tag at Costco, and a dedicated tasting review with positive feedback.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media style food vlog with fast editing and significant text overlays. Effective use of price anchoring and sensory description.
